title: Welcome to CleanZone!
message: Thank you for joining CleanZone. Together we can keep our community clean and green.

title: Pickup Scheduled
message: Your next garbage pickup is scheduled for Monday at 8:00 AM. Please place bins outside by 7:30 AM.

title: Weekly Report Available
message: Your weekly waste management report is now ready. Check the Reports section for details.

title: New Recycling Guidelines
message: Updated recycling guidelines have been published. Please review them under the Guide section.

title: Complaint Resolved
message: Your complaint #1024 about illegal dumping on Elm Street has been resolved. Thank you for reporting.

title: Community Clean-Up Event
message: Join us this Saturday for a community clean-up drive at Central Park from 9 AM to 12 PM.

title: Holiday Schedule Change
message: Due to the upcoming public holiday, garbage collection will be postponed by one day next week.

title: Tip: Reduce Food Waste
message: Did you know that composting food scraps can reduce your household waste by up to 30%? Start today!
